title: centella floridana
intro: Centella floridana, also known as yellow centella, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States and Mexico, belonging to the waterwort family (Hydrocotylaceae). The medicinal properties of Centella floridana lie in its high concentration of triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Centella floridana include improving cognitive function, enhancing memory, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Centella floridana can be found in supplements, teas, and topical creams, often used to promote skin health and reduce signs of aging.
